name: delta-rs Python (Delta Lake Native Python/Rust)

auth.notes: Local FS: no auth. Cloud: AWS/Azure/GCS storage credentials via env vars or config

performance.notes: Rust core; fast metadata operations; read/write bound by Parquet I/O

agent_readiness.notes: Delta Lake Python binding (Rust core, no JVM required). from deltalake import DeltaTable, write_deltalake. write_deltalake('s3://bucket/path', df, mode='append'). dt = DeltaTable('s3://bucket/path'). dt.to_pandas(). dt.to_pyarrow_table(). dt.history(). dt.restore(version=2). dt.vacuum(retention_hours=168). Schema evolution: write_deltalake(path, df, schema_mode='merge'). MERGE: dt.merge(source_df, 'target.id = source.id').when_matched_update_all().execute(). Partitioning: write_deltalake(path, df, partition_by=['date']). Time travel: DeltaTable(path, version=5). Works with Polars, Pandas, PyArrow natively. No Spark/JVM.

gotchas: Requires PyArrow — large dependency if not already using it
MERGE operation is relatively new — older versions have limited merge support
No streaming writes — batch only (no Structured Streaming like delta-spark)
Cloud storage credentials must be set correctly — silent failures on misconfigured auth
Not all Delta Lake features available vs Java/Spark delta-spark package
best_when: Delta Lake operations without Spark (pure Python/Rust, no JVM)
Data lakehouse writes with ACID transactions from Python scripts
Time travel and table history inspection
Polars or PyArrow workflows needing Delta Lake format
avoid_when: Streaming writes (use delta-spark with Structured Streaming)
When PySpark is already available (delta-spark is more complete)
Very large-scale DML operations requiring Spark optimization
summary: deltalake (delta-rs) provides Delta Lake operations in pure Python/Rust — no JVM. write_deltalake(path, df). DeltaTable(path).to_pandas(). MERGE, time travel, vacuum, history. Partition support. Type-annotated. Apache-2.0. Best for ACID Delta Lake writes from Python without Spark. Works with Polars, PyArrow, Pandas. No streaming writes. Requires PyArrow. Less complete than delta-spark for advanced features.
